parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor "Webブラウザ" as WebBrowser
participant "CCM GUI\n(Web)" as CCM_GUI_Web
participant "CCM GUI\n(WebSocket)" as CCM_GUI_WebSocket
participant "CCM SDK\n(IPC)" as CCM_SDK_IPC

activate WebBrowser
activate CCM_GUI_Web
activate CCM_GUI_WebSocket
activate CCM_SDK_IPC

CCM_SDK_IPC -> CCM_SDK_IPC : ネットワーク情報変更通知 受信\n(RegistRecieveNetworkInfoHandler)

CCM_SDK_IPC -->> CCM_GUI_WebSocket : ネットワーク情報変更通知 [notify]
note left of CCM_GUI_WebSocket
{
  "command": "NetworkInfo",
  "type": "notify",
  "data": {
    "ID": "xxx",
    "CellularInfo": [{
      "SignalStrength": "...",
      "SignalStrengthUnit": "...",
      "Operator": "...",
      "PLMN": "...",
      "Band": "...",
      "CellID": "...",
      "AirInterface": "...",
      "Manufacture": "...",
      "ModelName": "...",
      "IMEI": "..."
    }],
    "QosInterfaceType": {
      "key1": "val1",
      ...
    }
  }
}
end note

CCM_GUI_WebSocket -->> WebBrowser : 

WebBrowser -> WebBrowser : 1秒間隔で保持データを画面に表示

deactivate CCM_SDK_IPC
deactivate CCM_GUI_WebSocket
deactivate CCM_GUI_Web
deactivate WebBrowser
@enduml
```
